; DNS query fixture file for compliance testing (dnsperf / flamethrower format).
; Each line: <domain> <qtype>
; These represent a mix of real-world query patterns.

; Popular domains (should resolve via upstream)
google.com A
google.com AAAA
www.google.com A
github.com A
github.com AAAA
cloudflare.com A
example.com A
example.com MX
example.com TXT
example.com AAAA
example.com NS

; Domains that should be blocked (common ad networks)
ads.example.com A
tracking.example.com A
doubleclick.net A
googlesyndication.com A
adservice.google.com A

; PTR queries (reverse DNS)
8.8.8.8.in-addr.arpa PTR
1.1.1.1.in-addr.arpa PTR

; CNAME chains
www.example.com CNAME
mail.google.com MX

; TXT records (SPF, DKIM etc.)
_dmarc.google.com TXT
_spf.google.com TXT
